title: I Release Fear of Wealth Visibility and Allow Safety
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the belief that prosperity makes you vulnerable
excerpt: A short energy statement for when visible financial success feels dangerous rather than freeing. The release names the fear of being seen as wealthy; the allow points toward safety and protected prosperity.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 66 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the fear of being seen with money. The sense that having more means being more exposed, more resented, or more of a target. The release names that fear directly. The allow names the safety that wealth can carry alongside it.
I am ready to release every fear that wealth makes me a target or leaves me exposed. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow safety, protection, and quiet confidence as wealth grows in my life. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 66 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
